creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
On Thu, Mar 13, 2014 at 2:19 AM, Hiroto Kagotani
 <hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com> wrote:
 >  Port maintainer (lichray@gmail.com) is cc'd.
 
 The patch looks solid, except the lots of @dirrmtry on share/icons,
 fcitx's dependency creates them, I believe.
 
 A bigger issue is that fcitx is depended by lots of fcitx-* addons,
 only update fcitx and fcitx-config may break them.  I maintain
 all the fcitx-* ports, but for a long time I don't have energy to
 upgrade them.  If you volunteer to take them over, I can help
 review the patches to upgrade the addons.
 
 -- 
 Zhihao Yuan, ID lichray
 The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
